name: London: Changing of the Guard Experience – VR Travel

reviews.review_description:
This antiquated ceremony is one of the curiosities from the Royal Utopia.

Camera position is well selected, as this way you, the viewer, is experiencing the guard(s) saluting with the sword(s) up close. And hearing someone next to you whispering "they're coming for you!" may give you goosebumps ;))

Another funny thing about the Changing the Guards is that these old & new guards are closely guarded by the modern guards, bobbies ;))

And, orchestrating two Royal Guardian Orchestras is a thing. And the music they play is for Roayl Ears ;))

BTW, the crowd on the other side of the royal gates is ginormous! Apparently, this ceremony is a must see, or in VR: a must exepience!
